tool.name: GaCDI CDA
tool.description: search the Cancer Data Aggregator across NCI data commons

param.name: query_json
param.label: CDA query (JSON)
param.help: Keyword arguments for cdapython fetch_rows, e.g. {"table": "file", "match_all": ["file_format = BAM", "primary_diagnosis_site = lung"]}.

tool.help:
**GaCDI — Cancer Data Aggregator (CDA) importer**
`CDA <https://datacommons.cancer.gov/>`_ searches across NCI data commons (GDC, PDC, IDC, CDS) from one place. This tool runs a CDA ``file`` query and produces a **manifest/metadata table** describing every matching file — the owning commons, identifier, size, checksum and DRS URI.
Use that table to retrieve the actual data with the matching GaCDI importer (e.g. **GaCDI GDC** with the listed ``file_id``). Files exposing a direct download URL are additionally fetched into the collection.
**Query format**
Provide a JSON object of keyword arguments for cdapython's ``fetch_rows``::
{"table": "file", "match_all": ["file_format = BAM"]}
@HELP_FOOTER@
